text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fwahaha! They really know how to replicate
everyone's unique cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Just look how adorable this plushie is.
Umamusume are like actual miracles, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that I can live in the same universe as them...
I've discovered what it means to be happy all
over again!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And it's all thanks to you! ♪
